title: Better Pines
description:
Changing Spruce Trees into a teal/green color!
Perfect for your Winter Worlds!
body:
![B](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea475425d6c811a6ecfbb759e512217d6f55367c_0.webp)

A Refreshing Take on Winter Pines


Transform your Minecraft worlds into a serene, frosty wonderland with the Better Pines resource pack! 
This pack replaces traditional pine tree textures with a stunning blend of teal and green, evoking the peaceful beauty of snow-covered forests. 
The cool tones of the new textures are perfect for creating immersive winter landscapes, whether you're building cozy cabins or exploring frozen biomes.

With Better Pines, you'll bring a refreshing, wintery feel to your Minecraft adventures. Ideal for players who want to capture the crisp, tranquil essence of the colder months!
***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
